summary: Plan-only assessment: #80985 is a useful focused contributor PR with passing checks, but it changes cron delivery compatibility by rejecting announce-to-webchat across CLI and runtime paths. The hydrated ClawSweeper/Codex review explicitly calls for maintainer acceptance before merge, and the artifact does not contain a clean merge preflight with passed /review. Linked issue #80984 is related cron diagnostics work with a different root cause and should stay open.

actions.reason: Maintainer judgment is required to accept the compatibility behavior change and to complete a clean merge preflight before any merge action.
#80984 is related cron diagnostics work with distinct remaining scope, so it should not be closed or treated as fixed by #80985.

needs_human: #80985 requires maintainer acceptance of the compatibility change from accepted-but-broken announce-to-webchat cron configs to fail-fast rejection, plus a clean merge preflight before merge.
